title: Search later issues of The Pomona Progress for follow-up coverage
text: Later 1927-1928 issues of The Pomona Progress may report whether the sign was actually installed, any dedication event, or subsequent disputes.

title: Search San Dimas Chamber of Commerce minutes or archives
text: Chamber of commerce meeting minutes from mid-to-late 1927 could confirm the donation, installation committee actions, and ongoing electricity expense.

title: Search city council minutes
text: San Dimas or Los Angeles County governmental minutes from 1927 could reference the sign, its permitting, or later removal.

title: Search electrical permit records
text: Permit records from 1927 could confirm whether the sign was installed and provide technical or placement details not covered in the article.

title: Search public works records
text: Public works records could document installation, maintenance, or removal of the sign as municipal or utility infrastructure.

title: Search local photo and postcard collections
text: Local historical society, library, or private postcard collections may hold a photograph of the sign, which does not currently exist in this pack.

title: Search Sanborn maps or historical downtown maps
text: Sanborn fire insurance maps or other historical downtown maps of San Dimas from the late 1920s could help confirm the corner's layout at the time.

title: Search for newspaper references to removal, maintenance, or chamber electricity costs
text: Later newspaper references to the sign's removal, maintenance disputes, or changes in the chamber's electricity expenses could close out several open questions in this pack.
